race.comment: Plenty of win chances. AVONVIEW (9) doesn't win out of turn but is going well and was just pipped late by PATSY'S STAR here last time. Meets the winner 2kg better and can turn the tables. Deserves a win. PATSY'S STAR (5) may well have more weight but hard to fault recent form course and distance. Ran on hard to score latest and will be tough to stop again. OLYMPIAD (3) was also a course and distance winner last time, getting off the mark with the maiden win. Has upside but will have to carry more weight. LIGHTNING FLASH (7) was a 2400m winner latest just over the border. Hard fit and going well. One of the chances, MAKUSHA (4) is fitter for two runs back and put the writing on the wall latest when runner-up over a mile. Extra trip a plus and should feature.
